Covers sentence templates, collocations, paragraph structures, and a polishing workflow. Works for both English-language editing and Chinese-to-English translation.

items.name: DonutSmp-gamble-Rig
items.description: A Minecraft mod for DonutSMP-style gameplay that adds customizable gambling features and an easy-to-use interface. All features can be toggled on or off with fully customizable keybinds, allowing players to choose how they interact with the mod. Designed to be simple, configurable, and flexible for different playstyles and server setups.

items.name: rough_contact_etm
items.description: This project focuses on the calculation and simulation of fully coupled contact involving mechanical, electrical and thermal multi-physics fields on rough surfaces (only elastic normal contact is supported for the time being). Welcome to use.
